_comment: Copy to auth-hosts.json and add your own API hosts. One line per host: the broker injects the matching vault secret by host name so the agent calls `broker call http_call '{"host":"...","path":"..."}'` and never sees a key. Scheme is one of: bearer | header | basic | query | oauth2. Optional per-host `timeoutMs` (default 15000, max 300000) gives a genuinely slow endpoint — image generation, large uploads — a longer request budget; every other host stays on the tight default.

api.example-slow.com.note: Pattern: a slow endpoint (e.g. image generation) that needs longer than the 15s default

api.example-basic.com.note: Pattern: HTTP Basic with the key as username, empty password (set basicPasswordKey to draw the password from another vault key)

api.example-query.com.note: Pattern: credential as a ?api_key= query param

api.example-oauth2.com.note: Pattern: refresh-token → short-lived access token, injected as Bearer. secretHeaders adds further secret-valued headers (optional).
